name: API Documentation
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The Maropost Commerce Cloud (MCC) API allows developers to integrate directly with your online store, enabling automation, custom storefronts, data sync, and third-party application development. This article provides an overview of the API and links to the full developer reference."}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"What You Can Do With the API","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Developers can use the MCC API to programmatically manage store data across a wide range of business functions, including:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Products & Catalog Management","bold":true},{"text":" Create, update, import, or fetch product information, variants, pricing, and categories."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Orders & Fulfillment","bold":true},{"text":" Retrieve order details, update fulfillment statuses, manage shipping, and sync external systems."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Customers","bold":true},{"text":" Create customer accounts, update profile information, retrieve purchase history, or manage contact records."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Inventory","bold":true},{"text":" Fetch or update stock levels, manage warehouses, and sync inventory with external systems."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Sales Channels","bold":true},{"text":" Automate sales channel creation, configuration, and store management tasks."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"API Base URL","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"All API endpoints are served via:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"https://commerce-api.maropost.com/"}]}],"lang":"css"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"Authentication","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The MCC API uses "},{"text":"API Keys","bold":true},{"text":" for authentication. You must include your API key in every request:"}]},{"type":"code_block","children":[{"type":"code_line","children":[{"text":"Authorization: Bearer YOUR_API_KEY"}]}],"lang":"http"},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"If the key is missing or invalid, the request will return a "},{"text":"401 Unauthorized","code":true},{"text":" error."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h1","children":[{"text":"Available Resources & Endpoints","bold":true}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The API provides read and write access to all major data types in Commerce Cloud.
